title: How do I apply a coupon code on QuickCrate?
body: Applying a coupon code is simple. Add your items to the cart and proceed to checkout. On the checkout screen, look for the 'Apply Coupon' field (below the item list and above the payment section). Type or paste your coupon code and tap 'Apply'. If the code is valid and applicable to your cart, the discount is applied immediately and reflected in the order total. Common reasons a coupon may not apply: the code is expired, the cart total doesn't meet the minimum required value, the items in your cart are excluded from the promotion, the coupon is for first-time users only, or you've already used the code. If you think the coupon should apply but isn't, tap 'View Terms' next to the coupon field to check eligibility conditions. Only one coupon can be applied per order.

title: Where can I find QuickCrate coupon codes and deals?
body: QuickCrate deals and coupon codes are available through multiple channels. In-app: Check the 'Offers' tab on the home screen for active promotions, including category-specific discounts, bank offers, and app-exclusive deals. Push notifications: Enable deal notifications to get coupon codes sent directly to your phone. Email: Subscribe to our newsletter at quickcrate.in/newsletter for weekly deal digests. Social media: Follow @QuickCrateIndia on Instagram, Twitter, and Facebook — we post flash sale codes there. Third-party cashback portals: CashKaro, GoPaisa, and similar platforms list QuickCrate offers with additional cashback. Partner bank promotions: Check your credit or debit card's offer portal (e.g., HDFC SmartBuy, SBI Card) for QuickCrate-specific bank offers. New user codes: Your invite link contains a welcome code good for your first 3 orders.

title: What is the QuickCrate loyalty program?
body: QuickCrate's loyalty program, called QuickRewards, awards points on every purchase. You earn 1 QuickReward point for every ₹10 spent. Points accumulate in your account (visible under Account → QuickRewards) and can be redeemed at checkout at a rate of 100 points = ₹5 discount. Points are awarded after order delivery and are valid for 12 months from the date of issue. QuickCrate Plus subscribers earn 2x points on every order. Higher spending tiers (Silver, Gold, Platinum) unlock bonus multipliers, exclusive previews of new products, and priority customer support. Your tier is recalculated every 3 months based on spending in the previous quarter. Detailed tier benefits are listed in Account → QuickRewards → My Tier. Points cannot be transferred between accounts or redeemed for cash.

title: Why did my QuickCrate offer not apply at checkout?
body: There are several reasons why an offer may not apply at checkout. First, offers often have minimum cart value requirements — check the offer's terms for the threshold. Second, many offers apply to specific product categories (e.g., 'dairy only' or 'snacks only') — if your cart doesn't contain eligible items, the offer won't apply. Third, offers may be one-time-use per account; if you've already used it, it won't apply again. Fourth, bank-specific offers (e.g., '10% off with HDFC credit card') require payment with the specified card — using a different payment method disables the discount. Fifth, some offers are geo-specific and only valid in certain cities or zones. The 'My Offers' page shows all your eligible offers with filtering by eligibility — use it to verify before checkout.

title: What are QuickCrate flash sales and how do I participate?
body: Flash sales are time-limited promotional events on QuickCrate where select products are sold at deeply discounted prices — often 20-50% off. They typically run for 1-4 hours. To participate: Enable notifications so you get alerted when a flash sale begins. When notified, open the app and navigate to the 'Flash Sale' banner on the home screen. Add items to your cart quickly — flash sale stock is limited and items can sell out within minutes. At checkout, the flash price is automatically applied; no coupon code needed. Flash sale items cannot be combined with other discount coupons. If an item sells out before you complete checkout, it's removed from your cart. QuickCrate Plus members get a 15-minute early-access window before flash sales go public. Flash sales are announced 6-12 hours in advance on social media and via push notification.

title: How do bank card offers work on QuickCrate?
body: Bank card offers on QuickCrate provide additional discounts when you pay with a specific bank's credit or debit card. These offers are negotiated directly with banks and are in addition to any coupon or wallet discount you apply. To use a bank offer: browse available bank offers on the 'Offers' page or at checkout in the 'Bank Offers' section. Select the applicable offer to see its terms (min order, max discount, eligible card types). At checkout, pay using the specified card. The discount is deducted automatically — no code is needed. Bank offers apply after other discounts (coupon + bank offer can both apply if eligible). The discount is usually capped (e.g., max ₹150 off). Bank offer cashback credited to your card may take 1-2 billing cycles to appear, per your bank's schedule.

title: Can I use multiple coupons or offers on a single order?
body: QuickCrate allows one coupon code per order, but you can combine it with certain other discount types. Specifically, you can layer: one coupon code + a bank card offer + QuickRewards redemption + QuickCrate Wallet balance. However, two coupon codes cannot be applied simultaneously. Similarly, QuickCrate Plus delivery benefits (free delivery, priority dispatch) apply automatically for subscribers alongside any coupon. Flash sale prices are standalone and cannot be combined with additional coupons. The checkout screen shows a full discount breakdown, so you can see exactly what savings have been applied before confirming. To maximize savings, check if a bank offer is available before selecting your payment method, as the combination of coupon + bank offer often yields the best total discount.

title: What is the QuickCrate first-order discount?
body: New QuickCrate users receive a welcome discount on their first order. The current first-order offer is ₹100 off on a minimum cart of ₹200. This discount is automatically applied at checkout when you sign up — no code needed. If you signed up using a referral link, the welcome discount may be the referral offer (typically ₹100 off), which replaces the standard first-order offer (you get the best of the two). The first-order discount applies to most product categories but excludes tobacco, alcohol (in states where sold), and gift cards. It applies only once per verified phone number. After your first order, subsequent discounts come from promotions, loyalty rewards, and QuickCrate Plus subscription benefits. Check the 'My Offers' page after your first order for ongoing personalized deals.

title: How do I share and redeem a QuickCrate gift card?
body: QuickCrate gift cards are digital vouchers available for purchase under Account → Gift Cards → Buy Gift Card. Choose a denomination (₹200 to ₹5,000), enter the recipient's name and optionally their email or WhatsApp, and complete payment. The recipient gets a unique gift card code they can redeem at checkout under 'Apply Coupon / Gift Card'. Gift card balances are added to the recipient's QuickCrate Wallet. Gift cards are valid for 12 months from the date of purchase and can be used across multiple orders until the balance is exhausted. They are non-refundable and cannot be converted to cash. If a gift card code is lost, the purchaser can retrieve it from Account → Gift Cards → Purchase History. Gift cards cannot be used to purchase other gift cards.

title: What is QuickCrate's seasonal sale schedule?
body: QuickCrate runs major promotional sales aligned with Indian festivals and shopping events. Key annual events include: Republic Day Sale (January 26), Holi Sale (March), Eid Special (varies), Independence Day Sale (August 15), Onam/Ganesh Chaturthi Sale (August-September), Navratri and Dussehra Sale (October), Diwali Mega Sale (October-November), Christmas and New Year Sale (December). Additionally, QuickCrate runs monthly 'Payday Sales' on the last Friday of each month, catering to post-salary shopping. Flash sales can happen anytime based on inventory and partner promotions. The best way to stay informed is to enable sale notifications in your app settings and follow our social channels. Sale dates and offers are announced 3-7 days in advance. QuickCrate Plus members receive early access to all seasonal sales.
